dialog-basic-flow.title: Basic dialog shell
dialog-basic-flow.description: Shows the base layer over `GrModal`: a ready-made header/footer shell for review, approval and confirm-like scenarios.

dialog-section-config.title: Section config and internal state
dialog-section-config.description: Demonstrates `headerConfig` / `footerConfig` and local form state inside the dialog shell.

dialog-guarded-backdrop.title: Guarded backdrop for critical flows
dialog-guarded-backdrop.description: A dedicated scenario for `closeOnBackdrop=false`, when closing must happen only through explicit actions.

basic.title: Publish weekly digest
basic.body: `GrDialog` assembles a ready header/footer shell on top of `GrModal`, so it is convenient for simple approval flows.

guarded.title: Resolve blockers
guarded.body: In critical flows you can disable backdrop close and leave only explicit footer actions.
guarded.legalReview: 1 issue is waiting for legal review

section.title: Share workspace
section.body: The internal form state keeps living inside the dialog shell, while section config helps adapt density to compact workflows.
section.checkbox: I reviewed access levels and notification scope.
